ability: 每个夜晚*，你可以选择一名玩家：他死亡。如果你首次在夜晚选择放弃攻击，在此之后的每个夜晚改为你可以选择两名玩家：他们死亡。
otherNightReminder:
The Dormammu shows a 'no' head signal or points to a player, plus one if the Dormammu is marked 'Extra kill'. Those players die.

If no players were chosen, mark the Dormammu 'Extra kill'.
flavor: You've come to die! Your world is now my world, like all worlds!
